title: ozothamnus cinereus var. bracteolatus
intro: Ozothamnus cinereus var. bracteolatus, also known as the Bracted Silver Daisy Bush, is a shrubby plant in the daisy family native to eastern Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ozothamnus cinereus var. bracteolatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including colds, flu, and skin issues.
